preferences.autoCaptionLabel: Generate image captions on this device

menu.profileDescription: Your Nostr metadata (`kind:0`) will be published to connected spaces. Username is required.

intro.title: Welcome to Nodex
intro.description: Nodex is a Nostr-native workspace for tasks and discussions.
intro.features: Use channels, people filters, and relay controls to shape your space while composing tasks and comments in one flow.

picker.helper: Pick one highlighted area to begin its guide.

breadcrumbFallback.title: Breadcrumb is not visible right now
breadcrumbFallback.description: Open a task context first, skip this step, or end the guide.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Use view tabs and breadcrumbs to move through task contexts.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Use include/exclude channel and people filters effectively.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.description: Use columns, status lanes, and depth controls to organize work.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Plan tasks by date and review each day in the detail panel.

navigationSwitcher.title: Switch views
navigationSwitcher.description: Use the view switcher to move between Tree, Space, Kanban, Calendar, and Table.
navigationSwitcher.action: Click any view tab to continue.

navigationFocus.title: Open task context
navigationFocus.description: Click a task to navigate into its context and reveal the breadcrumb path.
navigationFocus.action: Click a task item to continue.

navigationBreadcrumb.title: Use breadcrumbs
navigationBreadcrumb.description: Use the breadcrumb row to move up the hierarchy or jump between parent tasks.
navigationBreadcrumb.action: Click a breadcrumb item to continue.

filtersRelays.title: Space selection
filtersRelays.description: Use *Spaces* to select which spaces are visible. Click a space icon to toggle it, or click its name for exclusive space focus.
filtersRelays.action: Click a space control to continue.

filtersChannels.title: Channel filters
filtersChannels.description: In *Channels*, click a channel name to show only posts with that channel. Click the # icon to cycle neutral -> include -> exclude for that channel. Click the hashtag icon to the left of *Channels* to reset channel filters.

filtersPeople.title: People filters
filtersPeople.description: In *People*, click a person name to show only posts from that person. Click the avatar/icon to toggle that person. Click the icon to the left of *People* to reset people filters.

filtersSearch.title: Search bar
filtersSearch.description: Use the bottom search bar to narrow visible tasks by text across all views.

filtersHashtagContent.title: Hashtags in content
filtersHashtagContent.description: Click a hashtag in a task to focus on that tag. Clear the tag filter to return to the full list.
filtersHashtagContent.action: Click a hashtag chip in a task item.

composeKind.title: Task vs comment
composeKind.description: Use the Kind selector to choose whether to post a task or a comment.
composeKind.action: Focus the kind selector to continue.

composeInput.title: Tags and mentions
composeInput.description: Use #tags to organize items and @mentions to reference people in the compose box. Included channels auto-prepopulate as hashtags. You can set a date type (Due, Scheduled, Start, End, or Milestone) so tasks appear in Calendar view; future Start dates are shown as not yet doable.
composeInput.action: Power-user hint: {{alternateModifier}}+Enter submits as the other kind when no autocomplete is open; with autocomplete open, use {{alternateModifier}}+Enter or {{alternateModifier}}+click to add the selected tag/mention as metadata without inserting token text.

mobileNavigationNav.title: Mobile views
mobileNavigationNav.description: Use the top navigation to switch between Tree, Space, List, and Calendar.
mobileNavigationNav.action: Tap a navigation tab to continue.

mobileNavigationFocus.title: Navigate into a task
mobileNavigationFocus.description: Tap a task item to open its focused context and navigation path.
mobileNavigationFocus.action: Tap a task item to continue.

mobileNavigationBreadcrumb.title: Use breadcrumbs
mobileNavigationBreadcrumb.description: Use the breadcrumb row to move up the hierarchy or jump between parent tasks.
mobileNavigationBreadcrumb.action: Tap a breadcrumb item to continue.

mobileFiltersOpen.title: Open Manage
mobileFiltersOpen.description: Tap *Manage* in the top navigation to open space, channel, and people filters.

mobileFiltersProperties.title: Profile properties
mobileFiltersProperties.description: In *Manage*, open the profile editor to review and set your key identity fields: name, display name, picture URL, NIP-05, and about text.

mobileFiltersUse.title: Use filters
mobileFiltersUse.description: In *Manage*, tap space chips to select spaces, channel chips to cycle neutral -> include -> exclude, and people chips to toggle people filters. Combine these controls to narrow timeline visibility before composing.

mobileComposeCombobox.title: Search/Compose combobox
mobileComposeCombobox.description: Use the combined bottom bar to search as you type and create tasks/comments from the same text using the submit button.
mobileComposeCombobox.action: Tap into the combined bar to continue.

kanbanColumnsStatus.title: Columns and status
kanbanColumnsStatus.description: Use To Do, In Progress, Done, and Closed columns to track status. Moving a task between columns changes its status.
kanbanColumnsStatus.action: Click or drag a card in the board to continue.

kanbanCreateInColumn.title: Create in a specific column
kanbanCreateInColumn.description: Use the + button in a column header to create a new task directly in that column's status.
kanbanCreateInColumn.action: Click a column + button to continue.

kanbanDepth.title: Depth levels
kanbanDepth.description: Use Levels next to search to switch between parent tasks and executable end nodes: Top-level shows only root tasks, limited levels include subtasks, and Leaves only shows tasks with no subtasks.
kanbanDepth.action: Open Levels and try Top-level, then Leaves only.

calendarMonths.title: Month timeline
calendarMonths.description: Scroll stacked months continuously to move through time.

calendarPickDay.title: Pick a day
calendarPickDay.description: Click any day cell to load that date in the detail panel.
calendarPickDay.action: Click a day in the calendar grid to continue.

calendarDayPanel.title: Day details
calendarDayPanel.description: Use the right panel to review tasks for the selected date, change their status, and create a new task/event for that day.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Username *
profile.nameInvalidNip05: Username must use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or hyphens
profile.nameTaken: This username is already known. Please choose another.
profile.noRelayConnected: Connect to at least one space before editing profile
profile.presenceDescription: Broadcast your current view and active task (NIP-38). Disable for privacy.
profile.undoSendDescription: Delay Nostr publish by a few seconds so you can undo from the toast or post card.
profile.autoCaptionDescription: Generate image alt text on this device. One-time model download may use roughly 30-80 MB.
profile.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Check space connectivity and try again.

channels.title: Channels
channels.cycleHint: Tap to cycle: neutral -> include -> exclude

kanban.depthHint: Kanban depth filter: root tasks, limited-depth tasks, all levels, or leaves only (tasks with no subtasks)
kanban.topLevelHint: Show only root tasks (no parent task)
kanban.projectsOnlyHint: Show only root tasks that contain subtasks
kanban.levelsHint: Show tasks up to {{count}} hierarchy levels deep
kanban.allLevelsHint: Show all parent tasks and subtasks at every depth
kanban.leavesOnlyHint: Show only leaf tasks (tasks without subtasks)

appError.title: Something went wrong
appError.description: The app hit an unexpected error. You can reload, or return to the main view.

publishQueue.retryUnavailable: Select an original space to enable retry
publishQueue.repostHint: Repost to currently selected space relays
publishQueue.repostUnavailable: Select a different space to enable repost

relay.managementDescription: View relay status, add or remove relays, and copy debug diagnostics.
relay.debugSummary: connected {{connected}} · read-only {{readOnly}} · connecting {{connecting}} · disconnected {{disconnected}} · connection {{connectionError}} · read-rejected {{verificationFailed}}

statusHints.readOnly: Reads from this relay still work, but publishing to it is currently unavailable.

relay.copyFailed: Could not copy relay debug data

mediaLightbox.title: Media preview
mediaLightbox.description: Preview media and navigate between post attachments
mediaLightbox.reducedDataPreview: Reduced-data mode is showing a preview first.

warnings.unsupported: Auto-caption is experimental and unsupported in this browser or device.
warnings.timeout: Caption generation timed out. You can still enter alt text manually.
warnings.failed: Caption generation failed on this device. You can still enter alt text manually.

rawEvent.title: Raw Nostr Event
rawEvent.description: Inspect the full event payload from the relay cache.
rawEvent.empty: Raw Nostr event data is unavailable for this post.

empty.noneScheduledForDay: No tasks scheduled for this day
empty.selectDay: Select a day to view tasks
empty.mobileQuickFilterFallback: No matches for the quick filter, showing all tasks.
empty.mobileQuickFilterFallbackScoped: No matches for the quick filter, showing tasks {{scope}}.

filtered.mobileFallback: Nothing yet in the current scope, showing everything.
filtered.action: Broaden the scope or break the silence.

waitingPrompts.calmBreath: One calm breath while we pull this in.
waitingPrompts.glanceAway: Quick glance away from the screen.
waitingPrompts.shoulderRoll: One shoulder roll and we continue.
waitingPrompts.syncBlinks: While it syncs, give your eyes a couple blinks.
waitingPrompts.shortBeat: A short beat while everything catches up.
waitingPrompts.postureSettle: Sit up a touch, we're nearly there.
waitingPrompts.sipWater: A sip of water fits here.
waitingPrompts.momentMore: Just a moment more, then go time.

error.none: Could not load posts from the selected space.
error.action: The selected space is currently unavailable.
error.unableToConnect: Unable to connect to the selected space.
error.readRejected: Read access was rejected by the selected space.
error.mixed: Some selected spaces are unavailable, and others rejected read access.

unfiltered.collectionTitle: This space is empty for now. Be the first to fill it.
collectionTitleOptions: Silence lives here for now. Leave the first trace.
A quiet page awaits. Write the opening line.
Nothing has bloomed here yet. Plant the first seed.
This room is still untouched. Start its story.
Only open sky for now. Be the first star.
